examples: I was treated with the utmost courtesy by the staff.
The president paid a courtesy call on Emperor Akihito.
Good customer relations require courtesy, professionalism and effective response.
Batarical Hatashmi(ph), one of the Sunni leaders, insists it was nothing more than a courtesy call.
On the Chilean--Pacific--side of the Andes, that's courtesy of the ocean and the cold Humboldt Current.
